name: phase1_starter_market_impact_sources
description: Reviewed starter source manifest for the packaged Phase 1 market impact relationship lane, including promoted country relationship slices.
storage_policy: Large raw downloads and normalized bulk outputs belong under /mnt/githubActions/ades_big_data, not in the package.

sources.source_name: Germany reviewed program/org relationship source lane
sources.license_notes: Reviewed source lane stores only normalized relationship metadata; source URLs and evidence snippets are retained under /mnt/githubActions/ades_big_data.
sources.notes: Production-promoted Germany first slice covering Boerse Frankfurt issuer/ticker/index bridges, ECB/Bundesbank/Destatis macro rows, BaFin/Bundesnetzagentur/BMWK official sector relationships, Kraftwerksstrategie program evidence, and FCAS/SCAF project guardrails.

sources.source_name: Italy reviewed program/org relationship source lane
sources.license_notes: Reviewed source lane stores only normalized relationship metadata; source URLs and evidence snippets are retained under /mnt/githubActions/ades_big_data.
sources.notes: Production-promoted Italy first slice covering Euronext Milan issuer/ticker/security bridges, Banca d'Italia/ISTAT macro rows, CONSOB/IVASS/ARERA/AGCOM/AGCM/AIFA/ENAC/ART/ANAC regulator sector rows, MEF/MIMIT/MASE/MIT policy rows, CDP/SACE/SIMEST/Invitalia/GME/GSE/PagoPA organization rows, and PNRR/export-program guardrails without direct program-to-ticker assertions.

sources.source_name: Australia reviewed program/org relationship source lane
sources.license_notes: Reviewed source lane stores only normalized relationship metadata; source URLs and evidence snippets are carried in row notes and retained under /mnt/githubActions/ades_big_data.
sources.notes: Production-promoted Australia first slice covering ASX issuer/ticker/index bridges, APRA/ASIC/TGA regulators, and government program or sector relationships from official public evidence.

sources.source_name: Brazil reviewed program/org relationship source lane
sources.license_notes: Reviewed source lane stores only normalized relationship metadata; source URLs and evidence snippets are retained under /mnt/githubActions/ades_big_data.
sources.notes: Production-promoted Brazil first slice covering B3 issuer/ticker/index bridges, BNDES/Zilia program relationships, transport projects, and official regulator or government sector relationships.

sources.source_name: Canada reviewed program/org relationship source lane
sources.license_notes: Reviewed source lane stores only normalized relationship metadata; source URLs and evidence snippets are retained under /mnt/githubActions/ades_big_data.
sources.notes: Production-promoted Canada first slice covering TMX issuer/ticker/index bridges, Bank of Canada/OSFI/CIB/ISED/CER/CRTC/CMHC/FCC/AAFC/Global Affairs official sector relationships, and guardrailed project/program paths.

sources.source_name: China reviewed program/org relationship source lane
sources.license_notes: Reviewed source lane stores only normalized relationship metadata; source URLs and evidence snippets are retained under /mnt/githubActions/ades_big_data.
sources.notes: Production-promoted China first slice covering SSE/SZSE/CNInfo/BSE/HKEX issuer/ticker/security bridges, PBOC/SAFE/NBS macro guardrail rows, official regulator or government sector rows, and Sam's Club/Walmart brand evidence without broad sector-to-issuer fanout.
